deviations.what: The original binds the image src against a separate 'img' JSON model ({img>/products/pic1} from sap/ui/demo/mock/img.json) alongside the default model for the widths. abap2UI5 has one default model, so the picture path is folded into it and the src binds it directly (client->_bind( pic1 )) - the 'img>' prefix is dropped and the last path segment (pic1) is identical, which structural-diff matches.

The original computes widthS/M/L from Device.system.phone in the controller (phone: 2/4/6em, else 5/10/15em). The bindings {/widthS..L} are ported 1:1 on the default model; the seed uses the desktop values, as the phone branch is a client-only Device decision. Widths render but the device-conditional seed is unverified in a running system.
